// Connect 4 for TMS9918 (P-LAB graphic card)
// Two-player drop-piece game - 1116 bytes
// By VERHILLE Arnaud, 2026
// Controls: 1-7 drop, R restart
// Enable P-LAB TMS9918 card in Hardware menu first
// Type 280R in Woz Monitor to run

0290: 99 00 40 C8 C0 2A D0 F8 A9 01 85 08 A9 00 85 09
02A0: 85 0A 20 A5 04 20 16 05 20 2B 05 C9 52 D0 03 4C
